member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Classification.ReqnrollClassificationTypeNames
member.summary: The canonical set of custom Reqnroll classification / semantic-token type names.

remarks.para: These names are the single source of truth shared by:

list.item: the LSP server's semantic-token legend (advertised in the initialize response), and
the Visual Studio extension's MEF ClassificationTypeDefinition exports (DeveroomClassifications), which map each name to a concrete editor colour.

remarks.para: Rather than emitting the generic LSP standard token types (keyword, string, parameter, …), the server declares these Reqnroll-specific names so that each IDE client can map a Reqnroll concept to a Reqnroll-specific colour instead of overloading a host theme's generic scopes. The values intentionally match the custom classification names already used by the existing Reqnroll.VisualStudio extension, giving existing users pixel-for-pixel continuity.

Legend stability: the order in is the contract between the server and every client (the index emitted in each semantic-token 5-tuple is an index into this list). Append new entries only — never reorder or remove existing ones — so that older client index assumptions remain valid across versions.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Classification.ReqnrollClassificationTypeNames.UndefinedStep
member.summary: Step text of a step with no matching binding. Only carries meaning once Roslyn/C# source-level binding discovery is available; reserved in the legend from Phase 1 so the legend never changes across phases.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Classification.ReqnrollClassificationTypeNames.AmbiguousStep
member.summary: Step text of a step that matches more than one step-definition binding (ambiguous). The test would fail at runtime with "Ambiguous step definitions"; highlighted to make the conflict visible in the editor.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Classification.ReqnrollClassificationTypeNames.Ordered
member.summary: The legend order. Indices into this array are the tokenTypeIndex emitted in the LSP semantic-token 5-tuples. Append-only (see "Legend stability" in the type remarks).

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.CSharpCodeGenerationConfiguration.NamespaceDeclarationStyle
member.summary: Specifies the namespace declaration style for generated C# code. Uses file-scoped namespaces when set to "file_scoped", otherwise uses block-scoped namespaces.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.CSharpCodeGenerationConfiguration.UseFileScopedNamespaces
member.summary: Determines if file-scoped namespaces should be used based on the EditorConfig setting.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.EditorConfigOptionsExtensions.UpdateFromEditorConfig``1(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptions,``0)
member.summary: For each property on annotated with , reads the corresponding key from and replaces the property value when the key is present. Supported property types: , , .

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentFeatureChildren
member.summary: Specifies whether child elements of Feature (Background, Rule, Scenario, Scenario Outline) should be indented.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentRuleChildren
member.summary: Specifies whether child elements fo Rule (Background, Scenario, Scenario Outline) should be indented.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentSteps
member.summary: Specifies whether steps of scenarios should be indented.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentAndSteps
member.summary: Specifies whether the 'And' and 'But' steps of the scenarios should have an additional indentation.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentDataTable
member.summary: Specifies whether DataTable arguments should be indented within the step.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentDocString
member.summary: Specifies whether DocString arguments should be indented within the step.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentExamples
member.summary: Specifies whether the Examples block should be indented within the Scenario Outline.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.IndentExamplesTable
member.summary: Specifies whether the Examples table should be indented within the Examples block.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.TableCellPaddingSize
member.summary: The number of space characters to be used on each sides as table cell padding.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.GherkinFormatConfiguration.TableCellRightAlignNumericContent
member.summary: Right-align numeric table cells

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptions
member.summary: Read-only view of EditorConfig settings that apply to a specific file path.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptions.GetOption``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Returns the value for , or if the key is absent.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptions.GetBoolOption(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convenience overload for boolean keys.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptionsProvider
member.summary: Resolves the EditorConfig options that apply to a given file-system path.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptionsProvider.GetEditorConfigOptionsByPath(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the merged EditorConfig settings that apply to , following the standard search-upward-from-file-directory semantics.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.IEditorConfigOptionsProvider.InvalidateCache(System.String)
member.summary: Evicts the cached parse result for the given .editorconfig file so that the next call to re-reads it from disk. No-op when no cache entry exists.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.NullEditorConfigOptions
member.summary: Returns the caller-supplied default for every key. Used when no .editorconfig applies.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Configuration.NullEditorConfigOptionsProvider
member.summary: No-op provider that always returns . Used in contexts where .editorconfig lookup is unavailable (tests, non-LSP hosts).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.DebuggableCancellationTokenSource.#ctor(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Do not forget to Dispose!

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.IIdeScope
member.summary: Minimal IDE scope contract needed by the Wizards layer. The full IIdeScope from Reqnroll.IdeSupport.VisualStudio has ~15 members (text buffers, Roslyn, solution events, etc.) that wizards do not need.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.IIdeActions
member.summary: Minimal actions contract: only error/problem reporting used by wizards.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.IdeSupportLogLevelConverter
member.summary: Canonical <-> mapping, shared by every place that bridges (our app-level logging API) onto 's ILogger/ILogger<T> abstractions.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.IdeSupportLoggerAdapter
member.summary: Adapts a single category onto an sink.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.IdeSupportLoggerFactory
member.summary: Bridges a single sink onto the standard / abstractions, so that consumers can be written against ILogger<T> while still writing through the same file/debug sink as everything else using directly.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.ITelemetryDebugLog
member.summary:
Debug-only sink that mirrors telemetry events to a local file for later review.
Deliberately independent of the analytics opt-out gate (REQNROLL_TELEMETRY_ENABLED): it records what the system produced even when transmission is disabled or the event is dropped downstream. Implementations must never throw — telemetry debugging must not break the feature path.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.ITelemetryDebugLog.IsEnabled
member.summary: Whether a sink is configured. When false, is a no-op.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.ITelemetryDebugLog.Record(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Appends one record describing a telemetry event.
member.param: Where the event was captured: "server" or "host".
The event properties (serialized as a JSON object); may be null.
Host only: whether the opt-out gate allowed transmission.
Host only: whether the event was actually handed to the channel.
Host only: the message if transmission threw, otherwise null.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.NullTelemetryDebugLog
member.summary: No-op sink used when the debug log is not configured.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.TelemetryDebugLog
member.summary: Factory that builds an from the REQNROLL_TELEMETRY_DEBUG_LOG environment variable. This is separate from REQNROLL_TELEMETRY_ENABLED (the transmission opt-out): the debug log is a developer aid and is off by default, regardless of whether telemetry transmission is enabled.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.TelemetryDebugLog.FromEnvironment
M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.TelemetryDebugLog.DefaultPath
member.summary: %LOCALAPPDATA%\Reqnroll\reqnroll-telemetry-{yyyyMMdd}.jsonl — a sibling of the existing diagnostic logs written by .

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.FileTelemetryDebugLog
member.summary: Appends telemetry records as newline-delimited JSON (one object per line) to a local file. Append-only and lock-guarded; all I/O errors are swallowed so telemetry debugging never affects the feature path.

member.name: E:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.ProjectSystem.Configuration.IDeveroomConfigurationProvider.ConfigurationChanged
member.summary: Raised on any thread when configuration changes.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.ProjectSystem.NuGetVersion.RequestedRange
member.summary: The project's requested package range for the package.
member.remarks: If the project uses packages.config, this will be same as the installed package version. If the project uses PackageReference, this is the version string in the project file, which may not match the resolved package version, and may not be single version string. If the project uses PackageReference, and the package is a transitive dependency, the value will be null.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.ProjectSystem.PathUtils.IsUnderFolder(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: True when is itself, or lives somewhere under it — with a directory-separator boundary check, unlike a bare filePath.StartsWith(folder).
member.remarks: A plain string-prefix check treats a sibling folder whose name happens to extend the prefix as "inside" it — e.g. @"C:\Repo\Minimalnet481\Foo.cs" starts with @"C:\Repo\Minimal" even though Minimalnet481 is a completely different folder than Minimal. Confirmed live: this let a sibling project's step-definition bindings bleed into another project's registry, producing false "ambiguous step" matches.
